context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the apply-stack-conventions instructions from the published Rails Agent Skills tile.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: ALL new code MUST have its test written and validated BEFORE implementation.

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Write the spec: bundle exec rspec spec/[path]_spec.rb

checklist.name: instruction-3
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Verify it FAILS — output must show the feature does not exist yet

checklist.name: instruction-4
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Write the implementation code

checklist.name: instruction-5
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Verify it PASSES — run the same spec and confirm green

checklist.name: instruction-6
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Each step should remain testable in isolation before wiring to the next layer.
